name: Olive Garden Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Moisten eggplant slices and coat lightly with flour.
2. Quickly brown the slices in hot oil, dusting each side generously with seasoned salt. When fork-tender and golden brown, transfer to a jelly roll pan. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes or until tender. Use 8 slices for this amount of sauce.
3. Combine the sauce, grape jelly, and broken-up tomatoes (using a fork). Heat on medium until piping hot. Do not boil; ensure the jelly is melted.
4. Arrange 2 eggplant slices on each of 4 plates. Cover each with 1 slice of mozzarella. Ladle the sauce over all, but do not cover completely.
5. Place the plates back in the oven for a few minutes to melt the cheese and serve promptly.
